mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_operation_log (user_id, operation, module, description, request_params, ip) VALUES (#{userId}, #{operation}, #{module}, #{description}, #{requestParams}, #{ip})
mapper.select: SELECT l.*, u.real_name AS user_name FROM sys_operation_log l LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON l.user_id = u.pk_user ORDER BY l.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_operation_log l
AND l.user_id = #{userId}
AND l.module LIKE CONCAT('%', #{module}, '%')
AND l.operation LIKE CONCAT('%', #{operation}, '%')
